notes: Round 1 worker case: use summaries plus current routing memory to refresh pressure, authorship, and compliance without touching the main orchestrator.
expected_checks: self_authorship stays mixed rather than empty

user_tag_summaries.parental_pressure: Cha me dang day em ve huong Y khoa va su on dinh, khien em so that vong neu chon thiet ke.
user_tag_summaries.core_tension: Em bi keo giua an toan gia dinh va ham muon lam design.
user_tag_summaries.self_authorship: Em da co mong muon rieng nhung thuong nhuong bo truoc ngon ngu cua gia dinh.
user_tag_summaries.compliance: Khi bi hoi thang, em de quay ve cau tra loi dep long nha.

routing_memory.content: Neu bo me khong can du, em nghieng ve huong nao?
Neu noi that thi em van nghieng ve design, nhung moi lan ve nha em lai noi la chac em se nghe theo bo me truoc da cho yen cua. Em biet nghe hoi rat dep long nguoi lon.
Cau 'nghe theo truoc da' nghe giong tam xoa ap luc hon la quyet dinh.
Da, em cung cam thay vay. Em chua dam noi do la lua chon cua minh, em dang noi cho an toan hon.

notes: Round 1 worker case: preserve active overload and deadline pressure while avoiding a fake reality-gap escalation.
expected_checks: burnout_risk becomes true with concrete reasoning
urgency becomes true with deadline-specific reasoning
reality_gap stays false or names no clear signal

user_tag_summaries.burnout_risk: Gan day em bi qua tai vi hoc them, thi cu, va ho so, nhung can them bang chung rat moi.
user_tag_summaries.urgency: Co suc ep han nop hoc bong va thi tot nghiep dang day em quyet nhanh.
user_tag_summaries.self_authorship: Luc it ap luc hon, em van muon tu chon ky hon thay vi dong mot lua chon cho xong.

routing_memory.content: Bay gio em dang met toi muc nao?
Hai tuan nay dem nao em cung ngu 3 tieng vi vua luyen de vua chay ho so. Em bi dau dau lien tuc va chi muon chot dai mot nganh on dinh cho xong truoc han nop.
Do la chon do em tin hay chon vi het suc?
Em nghi la vi em het suc hon. Neu qua duoc dot nay va duoc ngu lai, em se muon xem ky hon chu hien tai em dang quyet rat vo va.

notes: Round 1 worker case: use current evasive language to refresh reality-gap, avoidance, and vagueness fields conservatively.
expected_checks: reality_gap becomes true with claim-versus-proof mismatch

user_tag_summaries.reality_gap: Em dang noi ve mot ket qua rat lon nhung chua dua ra bang chung ve ky nang, lo trinh, hay cach tu nuoi minh.
user_tag_summaries.avoidance: Em thuong lat cau hoi ve tien, do hy sinh, va nang luc hien tai bang cach noi ve dam me.
user_tag_summaries.vague: Em hay noi bang slogan ve tu do va thanh cong ma khong neo vao chi tiet.

routing_memory.content: Anh dang hoi rat thang: trong 12 thang toi em se kiem tien va len tay nghe bang cach nao?
Em tin rang neu em cu giu lua va dream big thi som muon em cung se vao duoc mot role sang tao rat xung dang. Em khong muon bi keo xuong boi nhung cau hoi qua thuc dung luc nay.
Anh chua nghe mot buoc nao co the kiem chung duoc.
Vi em thay noi ve buoc cu the, tien nong, hay nang luc hien tai lam em mat mood. Em muon giu tam nhin lon truoc, con chi tiet roi se xoay sau.
